ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "band" TEXT /* Band or artist performing at the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the event is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., scheduled, cancelled, postponed) */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., concert, festival, theater) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "venue_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the venue (e.g., seated, general admission) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the venue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the venue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket type */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event for which tickets are sold */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of tickets available for sale */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., General Admission, VIP) */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., available, sold, reserved) */,
  "ticket_description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket (e.g., VIP package details) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, organizer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the purchase */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of tickets purchased */,
  "purchase_status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase (e.g., pending, completed, refunded) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event related to the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., purchase, cancellation) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., purchase, cancellation, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event for which the promotion applies */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, bundle deal) */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Code for the promotion (for tracking and validation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is a staff member */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being managed */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., coordinator, security) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the staff member */,
  "staff_type" TEXT /* Type of staff member (e.g., coordinator, technical) */,
  "staff_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or additional feedback by the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., review, rating, suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., event update, promotion, reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase associated with the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Gateway used for payment (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)
